forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 64. South wind around 3 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. Southwest wind 3 to 12 mph.

weather_report:
As twilight envelops Boston, the city basks in the calm of a mostly clear night. The temperature hovers comfortably around 64, a gentle south wind sweeping through with a barely perceptible whisper. The horizon begins to blend hues of soft violet and deepening blue, offering a fleeting glimpse of the day’s end, while the faint sparkle of city lights flickers alive in the distance.

As the sun rises on Tuesday, anticipation builds for a day bathed in warmth, promising mostly sunny skies and a high that dances around 91. With the southwest wind breathing at a youthful pace of 3 to 12 mph, one can expect a day that invites exploration and leisure. Dress lightly, perhaps in breathable fabrics that speak to the season, and keep a pair of sunglasses on hand for those moments when the sun spills forth in all its brilliance. This is a day made for wandering along the waterfront, perhaps indulging in an ice cream from a local shop or taking a leisurely stroll through one of Boston’s many parks. Whether it’s a quiet moment by the Charles or a visit to a favorite café, the conditions allure you outdoors, prompting you to savor this slice of summer.
